arabicText: أَسْرَارُ الْحُرُوفِ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا أَهْلُ الْعِرْفَانِ
latinTransliteration: Asrārul-ḥurūfi fī Ṣalātil-Fātiḥi lā ya‘lamuhā illā ahlul-‘irfān
englishTranslation: The secrets of the letters in Salat al-Fatih are known only to the people of gnosis.
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiirtéefu xarfi Salat al-Fatih, ñi and ak xam-xam rekk lañ ko xamé.
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْتِيفُ خَرْفِ صلاة الفاتح نْيِ اَنْدْ اَكْ خَمْ خَمْ رِكْ لَنْ كُ خَمِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ يَسْطَعُ فِي مَلَكُوتِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
latinTransliteration: Wa kullu ḥarfin minhā nūrun yasṭa‘u fī malakūtis-samāwāti wal-arḍ
englishTranslation: And every letter from it is a light shining in the kingdom of the heavens and the earth.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bépp xarf buy sùnek ab leer la buy sotti ci kaw suuf.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بِيقْ خَرْفْ بُيْ سُنِكْ اَبْ لِيرْ لَ بُيْ سُتِّ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ

arabicText: فَالْفَاءُ فَتْحٌ مِنَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَالْأَلِفُ أُلْفَةٌ بَيْنَ الْقُلُوبِ جَمِيعاً
latinTransliteration: Fal-fā'u fatḥun minar-Raḥmāni wal-alifu ulfatun baynal-qulūbi jamī‘ā
englishTranslation: For the 'Fa' represents opening from the All-Merciful, and the 'Alif' intimacy between all hearts.
wolofTranslationStandard: Fay bi ubbéem sa Boroom la, te Alif bi and gu rafet ca xol yi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فَيْ بِ أُبِّيمْ سَ بُرُومْ لَ تِ اَلِفْ بِ اَنْدْ جُ رَفِتْ سَ خُلْ يِ

arabicText: فَدَاوِمْ عَلَى تِلَاوَتِهَا بِالْحُضُورِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ الرَّبَّانِيَّةَ
latinTransliteration: Fa-dāwim ‘alā tilāwetihā bil-ḥuḍūri li-tanālal-anwārar-rabbāniyyah
englishTranslation: So remain constant in reciting it with presence of mind to receive divine lights.
wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga ko jàng and ak sa xel sa sùnek ngir nga guis leeram.
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ كُ جَنْجْ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَ خَلْ سَ سُنِكْ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِسْ لِيرَمْ

arabicText: أَسْرَارُ الْحُرُوفِ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا أَهْلُ الْعِرْفَانِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Asrārul-ḥurūfi fī Ṣalātil-Fātiḥi lā ya‘lamuhā illā ahlul-‘irfān (5)
englishTranslation: The secrets of the letters in Salat al-Fatih are known only to the people of gnosis. (Stanza 5)

arabicText: فَالْفَاءُ فَتْحٌ مِنَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَالْأَلِفُ أُلْفَةٌ بَيْنَ الْقُلُوبِ جَمِيعاً [27]
latinTransliteration: Fal-fā'u fatḥun minar-Raḥmāni wal-alifu ulfatun baynal-qulūbi jamī‘ā (27)
englishTranslation: For the 'Fa' represents opening from the All-Merciful, and the 'Alif' intimacy between all hearts. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fay bi ubbéem sa Boroom la, te Alif bi and gu rafet ca xol yi. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: فَيْ بِ أُبِّيمْ سَ بُرُومْ لَ تِ اَلِفْ بِ اَنْدْ جُ رَفِتْ سَ خُلْ يِ [27]

arabicText: فَدَاوِمْ عَلَى تِلَاوَتِهَا بِالْحُضُورِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ الرَّبَّانِيَّةَ [28]
latinTransliteration: Fa-dāwim ‘alā tilāwetihā bil-ḥuḍūri li-tanālal-anwārar-rabbāniyyah (28)
englishTranslation: So remain constant in reciting it with presence of mind to receive divine lights. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga ko jàng and ak sa xel sa sùnek ngir nga guis leeram. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ كُ جَنْجْ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَ خَلْ سَ سُنِكْ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِسْ لِيرَمْ [28]

arabicText: أَسْرَارُ الْحُرُوفِ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا أَهْلُ الْعِرْفَانِ [29]
latinTransliteration: Asrārul-ḥurūfi fī Ṣalātil-Fātiḥi lā ya‘lamuhā illā ahlul-‘irfān (29)
englishTranslation: The secrets of the letters in Salat al-Fatih are known only to the people of gnosis. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiirtéefu xarfi Salat al-Fatih, ñi and ak xam-xam rekk lañ ko xamé. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْتِيفُ خَرْفِ صلاة الفاتح نْيِ اَنْدْ اَكْ خَمْ خَمْ رِكْ لَنْ كُ خَمِ [29]

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ يَسْطَعُ فِي مَلَكُوتِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ [30]
